name: Storm Front
description:
Storm Front is a Vladof legendary grenade mod from Borderlands 2.

On impact it bursts into several shock Tesla beacons, combining MIRV-style splitting with Tesla arcs. Their fields often overlap, greatly extending coverage and letting targets take damage from more than one beacon at once.

It produces a shock blast when it splits and another when it times out, so standing close can be risky. Child grenades can be blocked by terrain, but they still function where they land, making it strong in tight areas.
notes:
Storm Front always rolls with a shock accessory and the Exterminator payload, shared with Vladof legendary AoE grenades like Fire Bee and Pandemic.

Its red text nods to the saying that lightning never strikes twice.

Kills made with Storm Front contribute to the Chemical Sprayer and Sprayowee challenges.

special.description:
On impact, spawns 5 child grenades that stick to surfaces. Each child emits Tesla shock damage in an area, then detonates. Child grenades deal reduced damage.

Sometimes lightning does strike twice.
special.title: Sometimes lightning does strike twice.
